---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new SDK example or runner improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Summary

A concise description of the SDK feature or operation you want to see an example for.

## Use Case / Motivation

Why is this example helpful? What common task does it illustrate?

## Proposed Execution Flow

Describe the sequence of actions for the example script (e.g. create account, deploy contract, query result).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Script successfully executes on Stellar testnet
- [ ] Thorough inline annotations explain each step
- [ ] Runner lists and executes the script
